instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs SysML for modeling at various abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer), uses ACME, AADL, and MontiArc as architecture description languages (ADLs) for component & connector perspectives, and addresses interoperability through integration of heterogeneous stakeholders [31]."
]
